name: solana-php/solana-sdk
description: A framework-agnostic PHP library for building Solana transactions, instructions, and integrating Solana payments into PHP applications.

suggest.ext-bcmath: Fallback for Base58 when GMP is unavailable (GMP is strongly preferred)
suggest.psr/http-client: Plug any PSR-18 HTTP client into RpcClient via Psr18HttpClient
suggest.psr/http-factory: PSR-17 request/stream factories, needed alongside psr/http-client
suggest.guzzlehttp/guzzle: A solid PSR-18 implementation that works out of the box
